entries.label: Desktop login submit

entries.notes: Source trace confirms active bridge wiring and product handoff path; no real Electron click/runtime receipt captured in P2-T07.

entries.label: File bridge denied permission

entries.notes: Permission-deny guard remains controller/test proven; active shell wiring is separately BLOCKED.

entries.label: Open temp preview
entries.handler: createTempPreviewManager.openTempPreview -> assertNoRendererDocumentBytes -> permissionClient.precheckFileBridgeAction(file_bridge.preview) -> documentProvider.fetchDocumentForPreview -> storage.createScopedTempFile; no active shell IPC/preload registration found in main.js

entries.label: Temp preview cache cleanup
entries.notes: Cleanup guard is source/test proven; active manager wiring remains separate from full operational PASS.

entries.label: Route-only matter/document/task deep links
entries.handler: parseMatterDeepLink -> validate matter/document/task route-only URL -> openMatterDeepLink -> permissionClient.precheckDeepLinkOpen -> audit opened/denied event
entries.notes: Parser/open logic is source/test traced; OS protocol registration and visible shell routing proof remain P6/P4.

entries.label: Auth callback deep link
entries.handler: parseMatterDeepLink(matter://auth/callback?code&state&issuer) validates required query and returns auth_callback routeOnly intent; openMatterDeepLink records auth_callback opened audit without permission precheck; auth completion state validation remains MainProcessAuthCoordinator.completeCallback
entries.notes: Auth callback parser/coordinator source traced; OS protocol callback and external auth receipt remain unproven.

entries.label: Forbidden action deep links
entries.handler: assertNoActionExecution rejects forbidden action hosts and query keys before route parsing/opening
entries.notes: Forbidden action deep links remain parser-guarded; no action execution route is allowed.

entries.label: Invalid deep link route/query/id
entries.handler: parseMatterDeepLink rejects unsupported scheme/route, unknown query, invalid identifier, invalid auth callback path, and missing auth callback query
entries.notes: Invalid deep link guard remains local parser evidence.

entries.label: Notification click route intent
entries.handler: notificationClickToRouteIntent(payload) requires routeUrl -> parseMatterDeepLink(routeUrl) -> returns { source: "notification", routeOnly: true, intent }
entries.notes: Notification route-intent parser is source/test traced, but native OS notification click delivery and visible shell routing are not proven.

entries.label: Notification action/sensitive payload guard
entries.handler: notificationClickToRouteIntent delegates to parseMatterDeepLink, so forbidden action/sensitive payload attempts are rejected by deep-link action and query guards
entries.notes: Notification guard remains parser-backed; OS notification delivery proof is separate on 0267.

entries.label: Signed internal update apply

entries.notes: Signed update controller is source/test traced, but no packaging receipt, owner approval, or active updater channel is present.

entries.label: Signed internal rollback
entries.handler: createUpdateController().rollback -> require previousVersion, matching verified target version, and valid signature before rolled_back state

entries.label: Vault detail panel overflow menus
entries.handler: Panel renders .icon-button with MoreHorizontal icon and no onClick/type/aria-label for document detail and version panels
entries.notes: Backfilled by P2-T05 because vault-detail is sidebar-reachable and renders Panel overflow icons not represented in the S1/P2-T01 ledger. P3-T06 observed Vault browser click behavior recorded; status not promoted before P4/P5 proof where applicable.

entries.label: Vault email panel overflow menu
entries.handler: Panel renders .icon-button with MoreHorizontal icon and no onClick/type/aria-label for email filing panel
entries.notes: Backfilled by P2-T05 because vault-email is sidebar-reachable and renders an unwired Panel overflow icon. P3-T06 observed Vault browser click behavior recorded; status not promoted before P4/P5 proof where applicable.

entries.label: Vault email filing unavailable state
entries.handler: EmailFilingView renders static provider-unavailable state; no submit or provider API handler exists
entries.notes: P2-T09 reclassified this Vault email filing unavailable state from BLOCKED to DESCRIPTOR_ONLY because it describes a missing external provider/runtime layer rather than exposing an executable operation.

entries.label: HRX audit step-up retry
entries.handler: fetchHrxAuditEvents returns kind === "step_up_required" -> render HrxStepUpChallenge; retry button onClick -> onRetry -> setRefreshKey(key + 1) -> fetchHrxAuditEvents()
entries.api_route: GET /api/hrx/audit with HRX step-up headers; conditional response body { step_up_required: true } renders retry state
entries.notes: Backfilled by P2-T06 as a conditional guarded-state button; no PASS claimed until step-up/guard proof exists. P3-T10 guarded browser state behavior recorded. P4-T05 maps audit proof requirements; row is not PASS without audit event/read proof.

entries.label: People header refresh on standalone HRX panels
entries.handler: PageHeader onClick -> setRefreshKey(key + 1), but standalone HRX panels are rendered without refreshKey/onRefresh props, so active panel data does not re-fetch; only PeopleHome overview fetchHrxEmployees runs
entries.api_route: GET /api/hrx/employees only; missing refresh propagation to GET /api/hrx/approvals, GET /api/hrx/recruiting/pipeline, GET /api/hrx/policies, GET /api/hrx/audit, GET /api/hrx/analytics, GET /api/hrx/ai/reviews, POST/read payroll sequence state, and admin collection reads
entries.notes: Backfilled by P2-T06 because the same visible header refresh is present on these HRX routes but source trace shows the active panel does not consume refreshKey.
